name: BigQuery Cost Safety Rules
description: Every BigQuery query MUST have a 'WHERE SQLDATE >= <int>' partition filter and run dry_run=True first, asserting bytes < 2_000_000_000. Never SELECT * from BigQuery.

name: GDELT GKG Table Warning
description: GKG table is 3.6TB and should be treated as a landmine. Never query GKG through the cold tier.

content: Cold tier rules: Query Events table only, max 30-day window per query, max 3 queries per user per month, always dry_run=True, cache results in Parquet keyed by country and date.

name: Enriched GKG Join Pattern
description: Use a single server-side JOIN between Events and GKG partitioned tables for cost-efficient enrichment. Use ARRAY_AGG and UNNEST in SQL to clean themes/persons/orgs.
